name: Clinton County YMCA
description: Clinton County YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Frankfort, IN. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Dorner Park
description: Dorner Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Frankfort, IN. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Green Meadows Intermediate School
description: Green Meadows Intermediate School is a place to play pickleball in Frankfort, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Kirklin Community Park
description: Come play pickleball at Kirklin Community Park in Kirklin, IN! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: TPA Park
description: Come play pickleball at TPA Park in Frankfort, IN! There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
